    Arsenus

BUILD STYLE

How I approach projects

Structure first

I like projects with a clear backend shape, predictable data, and room to grow without making simple features painful.

Fast by default

Static pages, focused APIs, and small interfaces keep the work practical and pleasant to use.

Respectful data

I prefer building with privacy and control in mind, especially when projects collect or store user information.

Scalable

I consistently design projects that are scalable to accommodate increasing traffic.

See my skills
